subject: feat(pwa): add version.json polling for non-SW deployment detection
body:
When a deployment only changes config (e.g. vercel.json headers) but no
code, the SW precache manifest stays identical and no update is detected.
This is how the X-Frame-Options stale cache issue persisted.

Added version.json polling (synctone/few-lap pattern):
- scripts/write-build-version.mjs writes { buildTime } at build time
- npm build runs it as a prebuild step
- pwa.js fetches on startup (3s delay) and hourly, compares with
  localStorage, surfaces mismatch as pwa-update-available
- applyUpdate() stores the new buildTime to prevent re-detection
- vercel.json serves version.json with no-cache headers
- Not precached by SW (not in globPatterns)
- Gitignored (generated file)

Tags: pwa, resilience, cross-project
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: minor
